HGSS.558.0000:
Yo, challenger!
Bugsy made this Gym. It’s a huge nest\r
of Bug-type Pokémon.\f
Bugsy’s young, but he’s a master of
Bug-type Pokémon!\f
It’s going to be tough without
my advice.\f
Let’s see... Bug-type Pokémon don’t
like fire.\f
Flying-type moves are
super effective, too.
HGSS.558.0001:
Well done! That was a great clash
of talented young Trainers.\f
With people like you, the future of
Pokémon is bright!
HGSS.558.0003:
Azalea Town Pokémon Gym\f
Leader: Bugsy
Certified Trainer!\r
